use_cases: Mobile app primary navigation with quick access to nested features like theme switching and content creation options
Social media or content creation apps needing expandable action menus for posting, screenshots, and voice notes
Cross-platform applications requiring consistent bottom navigation with contextual submenus
ai_summary: A mobile-first bottom navigation bar component featuring expandable submenus for different navigation contexts (home, search, notifications, profile, theme). Built with motion/react for smooth expand/collapse animations and react-use-measure for dynamic height calculations. Supports theme switching (light/dark/system), quick actions (Note, Voice, Screenshot), and notification filtering. Clean flat design using Hugeicons for a modern, minimalist aesthetic suitable for mobile applications.
